goal: Reduce time-to-value from 8+ steps to under 90 seconds. Close the acquisition-activation gap.
instructions: IMPORTANT: Only modify the 'passes' field. It is unacceptable to remove or edit test descriptions or steps — this could lead to missing or buggy functionality.

features.description: Anonymous users can access /try route and browse pre-built sample itineraries without signup
steps: Navigate to /try while logged out
Verify page loads without auth redirect
Verify no signup wall appears before viewing sample itineraries
Verify page has proper metadata and SEO tags
Verify navbar shows 'Sign Up' CTA instead of user menu

features.description: Pre-built sample itineraries display full day-by-day plans with activities, images, times, and prices
steps: Open /try as anonymous user
Verify at least 3 sample itineraries are available (e.g., Tokyo 5 days, Rome 3 days, Bali 7 days)
Click on a sample itinerary
Verify full day-by-day breakdown is visible
Verify each day shows activities with images, times, descriptions, and estimated costs
Verify itinerary is clearly labeled as 'Sample' or 'Example'
Verify itinerary is read-only (no edit capabilities)

features.description: Each sample itinerary has a prominent CTA to sign up and create a personalized version
steps: View a sample itinerary on /try
Verify 'Create Your Own Personalized Trip' CTA is visible and prominent
Verify CTA appears both at top and bottom of itinerary
Click the CTA
Verify it navigates to /auth/signup (or shows AuthPromptModal)
Verify selected destination is preserved so it can pre-fill trip wizard after signup

features.description: Landing page hero CTA links to /try instead of /auth/signup
steps: Visit landing page as anonymous user
Verify primary hero CTA says 'See It In Action' or 'See Sample Trips'
Click the CTA
Verify redirect to /try (not /auth/signup)
Verify secondary CTA still allows direct signup

features.description: No AI API calls or authenticated endpoints are triggered on /try page
steps: Navigate /try as anonymous user
Verify no calls to /api/ai/generate in network tab
Verify no authenticated API calls are made
Verify no user tokens are generated or stored
Verify sample data is static (loaded from JSON/data files, not API)
Verify network tab shows no calls to /api/trips or /api/user

features.description: Trip wizard is reduced from 4 steps to 3 steps (destination, dates, vibes+budget combined)
steps: Open trip creation wizard
Verify step 1 is Destination
Verify step 2 is Dates
Verify step 3 combines Vibes selection AND Budget/Pace selection
Verify progress indicator shows 3 steps total
Verify no separate step 4 exists

features.description: Vibes+Budget combined step has smart defaults so user can skip customization
steps: Navigate to step 3 of wizard
Verify vibes has pre-selected defaults based on user preferences (if available)
Verify budget defaults to 'balanced'
Verify pace defaults to 'moderate'
Verify user CAN customize but doesn't HAVE to
Click 'Generate' without changing defaults
Verify generation works with defaults

features.description: Separate onboarding flow is removed for new users — preferences collected during first trip creation
steps: Sign up as new user
Verify redirect goes to /trips (not /onboarding)
Verify welcome page is simplified or removed
Click 'Plan First Trip'
In vibes step, verify dietary/accessibility preferences are available as expandable options
Verify preferences are saved to user profile after first trip creation
Verify onboarding_completed is set to true after first trip

features.description: Empty trips dashboard shows a sample AI itinerary card instead of blank state
steps: Sign up as new user
Navigate to /trips
Verify sample itinerary card is visible (e.g., '7 Days in Japan')
Verify sample shows real activities, images, and daily breakdown
Verify 'Create Your Own' CTA is prominent
Verify sample is clearly labeled as example (not user's trip)

features.description: Empty state shows destination inspiration cards from popular destinations
steps: Navigate to /trips as new user with no trips
Verify 3-5 destination inspiration cards are shown below sample itinerary
Each card shows destination image, name, and 'Plan this trip' CTA
Clicking a card opens /trips/new with destination pre-filled
Verify cards use existing destination data from lib/destinations

features.description: Empty state includes social proof element
steps: Navigate to /trips as new user
Verify social proof text is visible (e.g., 'X travelers planned trips this week')
Verify number updates (can be approximate/cached)
Verify it doesn't show stale or zero numbers

features.description: Welcome email sent immediately after signup with visual showcase of app capabilities
steps: Sign up with a new email
Verify welcome email is received within 2 minutes
Verify email contains app preview/GIF showing itinerary generation
Verify email has clear CTA: 'Plan Your First Trip'
Verify CTA links to /trips/new
Verify email renders correctly on mobile
Verify unsubscribe link is present

features.description: Day 2 re-engagement email sent to users who haven't created a trip
steps: Sign up but do NOT create a trip
Wait 48 hours (or trigger manually via API)
Verify Day 2 email is received
Verify subject line: 'Your free AI trip plan is waiting'
Verify email contains direct link to trip creation
Verify email is NOT sent if user already created a trip
Verify unsubscribe link works

features.description: Day 5 social proof email sent to users who still haven't activated
steps: Sign up but do NOT create a trip for 5 days
Verify Day 5 email is received
Verify email contains social proof (traveler count, popular destinations)
Verify email has compelling CTA
Verify email is NOT sent if user already created a trip
Verify email is NOT sent if user unsubscribed

features.description: Email sequence infrastructure: Supabase Edge Function or cron-based trigger system
steps: Verify email sending function exists (Supabase Edge Function or API route)
Verify scheduling mechanism works (pg_cron or external cron)
Verify user segmentation query correctly identifies non-activated users
Verify duplicate prevention (no double-sends)
Verify opt-out/unsubscribe updates user preferences in database

features.description: First login shows a 3-step tooltip walkthrough ending at trip creation
steps: Log in for the first time after signup
Verify tooltip appears highlighting key UI element
Verify 3 sequential steps: welcome → explore → create trip
Verify tooltips can be dismissed individually or all at once
Verify tooltips don't appear on subsequent logins
Verify tooltip state is persisted (localStorage or database)

features.description: Progress indicator on dashboard: 'Your first trip is 0% planned'
steps: Log in as user with no trips
Verify progress card shows '0% — Start your first trip'
Start trip wizard, enter destination, leave
Return to dashboard
Verify progress updates to reflect partial completion
Create and save a trip
Verify progress card is replaced with trip card

features.description: PostHog activation funnel tracks demo-to-signup conversion
steps: Visit /try as anonymous user
Browse sample itineraries
Click 'Create Your Own' CTA and sign up
Verify PostHog events fired: demo_page_viewed, demo_itinerary_viewed, demo_signup_prompted, demo_signup_completed
Verify funnel can be built in PostHog dashboard from these events

features.description: Time-to-value metric is tracked from signup to first trip save
steps: Sign up as new user
Create and save a trip
Verify PostHog event 'first_trip_saved' includes time_to_value_minutes property
Verify time_to_value_minutes is calculated correctly (signup timestamp to save timestamp)
Verify metric is visible in PostHog dashboard

features.description: Activation funnel dashboard exists in PostHog with key conversion steps
steps: Open PostHog dashboard
Verify 'Activation Funnel' dashboard exists
Verify funnel steps: visit → demo_view → signup → first_trip_generated → first_trip_saved → first_trip_shared
Verify conversion rates are calculated between each step
Verify funnel can be filtered by signup method (email/google)

features.description: All new UI strings in demo mode and streamlined wizard have translations in EN, ES, IT
steps: Navigate to /try in English — verify no missing translation keys
Navigate to /es/try in Spanish — verify all text is translated
Navigate to /it/try in Italian — verify all text is translated
Check empty state on /trips in all 3 locales
Check tooltip walkthrough text in all 3 locales
Verify no hardcoded English strings in new components

features.description: Email templates support user's preferred language
steps: Sign up with preferred_language set to 'es'
Verify welcome email is in Spanish
Sign up with preferred_language set to 'it'
Verify welcome email is in Italian
Verify email subject lines are also translated

features.description: Demo mode /try page loads in under 2 seconds on 3G connection
steps: Run Lighthouse on /try page
Verify LCP < 2.5s
Verify no render-blocking resources beyond critical CSS
Verify page is statically generated (no dynamic data fetching)
Verify images are optimized and lazy-loaded
